## Checklist

- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My code follows existing patterns in the repo
- [ ] New scripts/modules have a provenance header (What Problem / How & Why / Written)
- [ ] I've updated docs if behavior changed
- [ ] I've added or updated tests where appropriate
- [ ] I've run the relevant test suite locally (optional but helpful)
- [ ] My PR title is descriptive
